primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between samples grouped by specific molecular variants.
evidence: we conducted an exhaustive quantitative proteomics-based interaction screening using three pairs of DNA probes that are capable or incapable of folding into G4 structures
We also obtained the corresponding mutated probes incompetent in G4 folding.

attributes.agent: G4 DNA probes (human telomere, c-MYC promoter, c-KIT promoter)
attributes.route_or_context: biotin-conjugated DNA immobilized on streptavidin agarose beads
evidence: The annealed biotin-conjugated G4 DNA probes and the corresponding mutant probes, at a concentration of 0.5 μM, were incubated separately with high-capacity streptavidin agarose beads
The DNA-bound streptavidin beads were then incubated with 500 μg of nuclear proteome... at 4C with rocking for 2 hr.

attributes.route_or_context: biotin-conjugated DNA immobilized on streptavidin agarose beads
evidence: The annealed biotin-conjugated G4 DNA probes and the corresponding mutant probes, at a concentration of 0.5 μM, were incubated separately with high-capacity streptavidin agarose beads
The DNA-bound streptavidin beads were then incubated with 500 μg of nuclear proteome... at 4C with rocking for 2 hr.

control_arms: M4 (mutated probes incompetent in G4 folding)
replicate_hints: a minimum of 4 independent (2 forward and 2 reverse) SILAC-based interaction screening experiments for each pair of G4/M4 probes
multiplex_channel_hints: forward experiment, where the light- and heavy-labeled nuclear proteomes were passed through streptavidin columns immobilized with biotin-conjugated G4 and M4 DNA probes
reverse experiment... where the heavy and light nuclear protein lysates were incubated with the G4-containing probe and the mutant control probe

evidence: the protein needs to be enriched on the G4 over the corresponding M4 probes in both forward and reverse SILAC experiments with an average G4/M4 ratio being greater than 1.5

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment explicitly uses SILAC (stable isotope labeling by amino acids in cell culture) with heavy-labeled arginine and lysine, and data was acquired using a DDA (data-dependent acquisition) approach on an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos.
